RULING:
DEFENDANT KINGS POINT INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Specially Appearing Defendant Kings Point Industries, Inc.'s motion to quash service of summons for lack of personal jurisdiction is granted. The motion is granted because this Court lacks personal jurisdiction over Kings Point Industries, Inc. Plaintiffs' request for a continuance is denied. Pursuant to defendant's request and no objection by plaintiff the Court took judicial notice of Exhibits A (Complaint filed on 1/28/14), B (First Amended Complaint filed on 8/20/14), C (Preliminary Fact Sheet filed on 1/28/14) and D (Plaintiffs' verified Answers to Interrogatories, Set one served on 10/17/14).
